description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Kamiton)

Rank: 5

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, F

This technique uses paper as a deadly weapon, trapping a creature (or one of its limb) in a paper cocoon in order to hinder or asphyxiate it. If the target fails its saving throw, two things may happen: either the user targeted one of its limbs with the paper and the target will be Entangled as per condition of the same name, or the victim is completely covered with paper and held completely immobile and helpless as well as suffocating.

An immobilized creature cannot perform techniques requiring Mobility, Half Seals or Hand Seals, cannot move or perform any actions requiring freedom of movement. The creature can attempt to break through the hold each round by spending a full-round action making a Break check (DC 25).

A creature who is covered with paper may hold its breath for a number of rounds equal to its Constitution Score minus 1 for every break attempt or every round is does not take only move or free actions. After this period of time, it must make a Constitution check (DC 10) each round to hold its breath or begin suffocating. Each round the DC increases by 1. When a creature fails one of these checks, it begins to suffocate, falling unconscious with 0 Hit Points. In the following round it drops to -1 Hit Points and is dying. The third round after failing the check, the creatures dies of asphyxiation.

This technique cannot solidify more than one Chakrabearing object (like an exploding tag or advanced seal) among the objects it affects. If such an object hits a creature, they have a -4 Reflex save against the object, unless it is removed before it activates.

Requires: Kami no Arashi (3), 7 ranks Craft (Visual Arts)

Material Focus: A mass of paper equal to the creature to entangle, or two size category smaller than the creature for one of its limb.
